case_title: LAW OFFICE OF ROBERT BOCKELMAN VS ROLLINS, LANITA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $442.22 FILED BY LAW OFFICE OF ROBERT BOCKELMAN AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLINS, LANITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO LANITA ROLLINS RETURNED SIGNED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-24-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-19-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST; IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICE OF ROBERT BOCKELMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROLLINS, LANITA $165.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $197.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLINS, LANITA
